decisions.title: Use one authoritative skill source
decisions.rationale: Treat .agents/skills as the development source for all Creator Toolchain skills.

decisions.title: Generate the plugin skill mirror deterministically
decisions.rationale: Require byte-equivalent plugin skills and reject missing, changed, or extra files.

decisions.title: Enforce an exact runtime package inventory
decisions.rationale: Build and publish only files covered by the package integrity contract.
